issues.description: Main ability trigger should be 'Activated' with cost condition, not separate 'Trigger' effect. The DON!! cost (−2) must be represented as a condition or integrated into the Activated trigger, not as a standalone GiveDon action.
KO action missing 'count' field. Should specify 'count':1 to match 'up to 1' in card text.

Incorrect second effect. 'GiveDon' action is backwards – the card costs DON!! (player loses DON!!), not gains them. This effect should be removed or restructured as a cost mechanic within the Activated trigger.
